  ⎿  Added 47 lines, removed 3 lines
      36    }
      37  }
      38  
      39 +// Signals are matched only against the live region (screen ta
         +il), never the                                                
      40 +// scrollback, so old transcript text can't be mistaken for cu
         +rrent state.                                                  
      41 +const stateTailLines = 24                                     
      42 +                                                              
      43 +var (                                                         
      44 +  // Busy: the live footer Claude renders while a turn is runn
         +ing.                                                          
      45 +  reBusy = regexp.MustCompile(`(?i)esc to interrupt`)         
      46 +                                                              
      47 +  // Confirmation dialogs — several INDEPENDENT signals so a w
         +ording change in                                              
                          9 new messages (ctrl+End) ↓
